mapper.select:
select count(1) from tool_box t join ( select tool_id, MAX( CASE WHEN version IS NOT NULL THEN CAST( CASE WHEN POSITION('.' IN SUBSTRING(version, 2)) > 0 THEN SUBSTRING(SUBSTRING(version, 2), 1, POSITION('.' IN SUBSTRING(version, 2)) - 1) ELSE SUBSTRING(version, 2) END AS INTEGER) ELSE NULL END ) AS max_major from tool_box
and user_id =#{userId} and space_id is null
and space_id =#{spaceId}
and deleted = 0
GROUP BY tool_id ) t1 on t.tool_id = t1.tool_id
and t.deleted = 0
and t.user_id =#{userId} and t.space_id is null
and t.space_id =#{spaceId}
and ((t.version IS NULL AND t1.max_major IS NULL) or (CAST( CASE WHEN POSITION('.' IN SUBSTRING(t.version, 2)) > 0 THEN SUBSTRING(SUBSTRING(t.version, 2), 1, POSITION('.' IN SUBSTRING(t.version, 2)) - 1) ELSE SUBSTRING(t.version, 2) END AS INTEGER) = t1.max_major))
and (POSITION(#{content} IN t.name) > 0 or POSITION(#{content} IN t.description) > 0)
and t.status = #{status}
select * from tool_box where deleted = 0 and is_public = 1

select * from tool_box
id in
#{item}
and deleted = 0
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM bot_tool_rel x where x.tool_id = #{toolId};
SELECT heat_value from tool_box_heat_value WHERE tool_name = #{name}
